[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00010100 2
1 11010111 6
2 01000110 3
3 11111111 a
4 11011110 6
5 11010111 6
6 01000110 3
7 11111111 a
